[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101111011 8
1 0111011011 7
2 0010011011 5
3 1010000000 2
4 0010111100 5
5 1001010010 4
6 0001111000 4
7 0001101011 5

01 10 0010011011 5 match 2
12 21 0010000000 1
23 32 0000000000 a
34 43 0001000001 2
45 54 1011001000 4
56 65 0000001000 1
67 76 0100001000 2
70 07 0101011011 6

02 20 0010000000 1
13 31 0000000011 2
24 42 1010000000 2 match 3
35 53 0001100000 2
46 64 0000001000 1
57 75 1001111000 5
60 06 0100001000 2
71 17 0000011011 4

03 30 0101000011 4
14 41 0010001001 3
25 52 1010000000 2 match 3
36 63 0100000100 2
47 74 1001001001 4
50 05 0011011000 4
61 16 0000001000 1
72 27 1000000000 1

04 40 0011001001 4
15 51 0010011000 3
26 62 0000000000 a
37 73 0101100011 5
